mapper.update: UPDATE t_report SET status = #{status}, processor_id = #{processorId}, process_remark = #{processRemark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_report
reporter_id, target_type, target_id, report_reason, report_detail, images, status,
#{reporterId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reportReason}, #{reportDetail}, #{images}, #{status},
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_report
AND status = #{status}
